steps.title: Locate the list break
steps.content: The sentence is listing common elements in Celtic art. One item is intricate patterns that held symbolic significance; another is depictions of birds, horses, and other animals. Because the items are complex, a semicolon can mark the boundary between them.

steps.title: Separate the series items
steps.content: B uses only a comma, which blurs the boundary between complex list items. C turns a list item into a separate sentence, and D uses a colon even though the next noun phrase is another item in the series, not an explanation of significance. The answer is A.
